overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic horror game showing a character exploring a foggy, rain-soaked fishing village harbor area. The character walks along a wet road, approaches a wooden building adorned with hanging buoys, and explores a cluttered backyard containing a pickup truck, forklift, and various fishing equipment and crates.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural roadside with guardrail and birch trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet asphalt road having emerged from dense roadside bushes

entered.detail: wet two-lane road with visible lane markings
metal guardrail running alongside the road
yellow diamond-shaped pedestrian crossing warning sign
tall birch trees with sparse autumn foliage
dark wooden building visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy, rain-soaked rural road bordered by a metal guardrail and birch trees. The atmosphere is moody and desaturated, with a dark wooden building visible in the far distance through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront supply building exterior with hanging buoys

events.description: approaches the dark wooden building with red and white buoys hanging on the exterior wall
turns right and walks through an open chain-link fence gate into the compound

agents.ego_description: approaching the building and entering the fenced compound through the side gate

notable_agents.action: person sitting against the building wall near the hanging buoys

entered.detail: cluster of red and white fishing buoys hanging on the building wall
metal chain-link fence surrounding the compound
open gate in the fence leading into the backyard area

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a weathered wooden building decorated with hanging fishing buoys, where a person sits against the wall. The camera turns toward an open chain-link fence gate and enters the compound, leaving the roadside behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered backyard with parked truck and utility equipment

events.description: character pulls out a flashlight and shines it on the pickup truck's cab window

agents.ego_description: exploring the compound and inspecting the old pickup truck with a flashlight beam

entered.detail: old gray pickup truck with red interior parked in the yard
stack of blue plastic storage crates
cardboard box on the ground near the truck

segments.scene_description: Inside the fenced compound, the character explores a gravel yard containing an old pickup truck, utility boxes, and stacked crates. The character uses a flashlight to inspect the truck's cab before continuing deeper into the cluttered area.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial storage yard with forklift and fishing gear

agents.ego_description: walking through the cluttered yard past fishing nets and industrial equipment toward the building entrance

entered.detail: yellow industrial forklift parked near the building
green fishing net covering equipment on the ground
red life preserver ring resting on a blue container
corrugated metal wall section of the building with a window
metal awning over the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the narrow industrial yard, passing a yellow forklift, fishing nets, and a red life ring. The scene focuses on the corrugated metal building entrance as the character approaches the awning-covered doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, rain-soaked road into the cluttered industrial yard of a fishing compound. It begins with a walk along a foggy rural road bordered by birch trees and a metal guardrail, moving toward a dark wooden building emerging from the mist. As the character reaches the weathered structure adorned with hanging buoys, the camera turns away from the roadside to pass through an open chain-link fence gate. The scene then shifts into a gravel yard where a flashlight illuminates an old pickup truck and stacked crates before the path narrows through a collection of fishing nets, a red life ring, and a yellow forklift. Finally, the movement leads deeper into the compound, concluding as the character approaches the awning-covered entrance of a corrugated metal building.
